subject: Re: Thank you!
body:
your stomach is usually right, I would trust it.. You can hear things in his voice that I can't.. ..That being said, I can't imagine someone like him with no cell phone whatsoever, the party I understand /You also should be aware that long distance relationships are difficult/ They are more so if you attempt not to be realistic. for ex.. he has to go out with his friends and it would be different if you were there, you both need to talk about it..

----- Original Message ----
From: "danars07@aol.com" <danars07@aol.com>
To: jeeproject@yahoo.com
Sent: Monday, December 18, 2006 8:42:25 PM
Subject: Thank you!

Hello Jeffrey,
    I just wanted to say thank you for allowing me to take time off work 
to go to Germany.  Jeffrey, I feel as if you're my best friend and I 
know that you're very good in reading into these sorts of things, even 
if the answer isn't what I want to hear. Could you please give me your 
opinon if you have time?
   On the phone Julian said that he wants "it" to work out but he 
doesn't think it's working. He said it's distance but I have a feeling 
that's just an excuse. He asked before if I would come for New Year's 
and also that night. So do you think he really does want to see me or 
he wants a booty call or he just wants to end "it" in person. Also, he 
had plans to go out to dinner with over 50 friends and now that I'm 
coming he just wants to have a few friends over to his apartment.  
Maybe I'm just being a woman and over-thinking things.
   Also, he said since his tmobile bill was so expensive that they shut 
his service off, meaning he can't make phone calls or send text 
messages. Does this sound fishy?
   I'm sorry if I bothered you but I would really like to hear what you 
have to say. Is there anything I should do? Talk to you soon.

                                                                         
Love,
                                                                         
   Dana B
